name: Claudesavvy
description: Monitor Claude Code usage in real-time. Explore conversations, sub-agents, teams, and token analytics — all with clickable insights that take you straight to the detail you need. Free, open-source, and takes minutes to set up.
longDescription: Monitor Claude Code usage in real-time. Explore conversations, sub-agents, teams, and token analytics — all with clickable insights that take you straight to the detail you need. Free, open-source, and takes minutes to set up. Understanding Claude Code Costs Claude Code costs can quickly accumulate without proper monitoring. Our open-source dashboard helps you: Track Claude Code usage across multiple projects in real-time Drill into Conversation Analytics — see cost, turns, and context usage per session Monitor Sub-Agent exchanges with per-invocation token and cost breakdowns Monitor and control Claude Code costs with customizable alerts and budgets Track Teams usage and aggregate spend across your organization Analyze per-project spending to optimize resource allocation
